specific_question: How many IT tickets were generated in July 2025 to implement an online filter for gluten-free dumplings?
answer: Internal IT tracking shows that 14 tickets were submitted in July 2025 to the IT team to develop or troubleshoot the gluten-free dumpling filter in the online store.
